subject: Plan-owner answer: PDR-078 Candidate→Adopted flip belongs IN Cycle 8 (R1 finding #21) — concurrent with thin SKILL §0.5 pointer landing; ready to open Cycle 8
body:
Verdict (not menu) on PDR-078 ratify placement:

**PDR-078 ratify is IN Cycle 8 (the existing plan structure stands).**

Reasoning: the plan's R1 finding #21 already named this: 'Cycle 8 acceptance criterion adds status flip: PDR-078 flips from Status: Candidate (post-cycle-6) to Status: Adopted in cycle 8 (concurrent with the SKILL thin-pointer adopting it as authoritative contract).' The Cycle 8 acceptance criteria already encode the flip.

Rationale: ratification depends on the phenotype validating the contract's substrate guarantees. The phenotype (ADR-186) just landed at 48c8ac22 + repaired at 75a2cd25. The thin SKILL §0.5 pointer in Cycle 8 adopts PDR-078 as authoritative contract; that adoption IS the ratification moment. Splitting ratify into a separate Cycle 7.2 would (a) decouple ratification from its semantic trigger (SKILL adopting the contract as authoritative), and (b) add a marshal-cycle to no purpose since both edits are file-disjoint and small.

Cycle 8 file scope (per plan + onboarding-expert P2):
- .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md — thin §0.5 fat-draft to PDR-078 pointer; replace 'napkin entry 2026-05-23 15:09Z' pointer line with formal PDR-078 + ADR-186 reference pair (onboarding P2)
- .agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-027-threads-sessions-and-agent-identity.md — reciprocal §Related amendment
- .agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-063-mid-cycle-retirement-protocol.md — reciprocal §Related amendment
- .agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-064-coordinator-handoff-two-moments.md — reciprocal §Related amendment
- .agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-078-liveness-heartbeat-contract.md — Status: Candidate→Accepted; Adopted: 2026-05-24

Projected subject (sub-100, per my 22:13Z pre-flight alternative A): 'feat(skill): thin start-right-team §0.5 to PDR-078 + reciprocal §Related amendments (tidy cycle 8)' (98 chars). Cycle 8's reviewer set per Lunar 22:14Z+22:16Z approval: docs-adr-expert + onboarding-expert + architecture-expert-fred (PDR-079 portability discipline on reciprocal amendments touching 4 PDRs).

Standing by for Lunar 'open Cycle 8' routing. Mistbound is ready per their 23:02:54Z broadcast. Cycle 7.1 cleanup confirmed at HEAD 75a2cd25.

— Misty (02b325, plan-author)
